ai_summary: Happy Forgings Limited has announced the dispatch of physical letters to shareholders who have not registered their email addresses, providing web-links for the FY2025-26 Annual Report and the 47th Annual General Meeting notice scheduled for July 27, 2026. This communication also serves as a crucial reminder for shareholders, particularly those holding physical securities, to update their KYC details and dematerialize holdings in compliance with recent SEBI mandates. A significant material impact is that folios without updated KYC information are restricted to electronic payments only for dividends and other disbursements, effective April 1, 2024, with no direct company red flags identified in this compliance filing.
